title: Ultra Vanila
description: Ultra Vanilla enhances Minecraft’s vanilla gameplay with lightweight improvements, better performance, and essential quality-of-life features
body:
Ultra Vanilla is a Minecraft modpack built for hardcore survival content, designed to enhance the vanilla experience without changing its core mechanics.
This modpack focuses on performance optimization, quality-of-life improvements, and balanced gameplay, making it ideal for intense and immersive survival challenges.

Ultra Vanilla is the modpack used in my Hardcore Survival TikTok content, where every decision matters and progression feels rewarding while staying true to vanilla Minecraft.
Gameplay clips, progress updates, and hardcore moments are regularly shared through TikTok videos linked directly to this project.

[Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@vietsbud.07/video/7592511945945681173)
